hero.eyebrow.description: Small eyebrow label above the hero headline.
hero.eyebrow.notes: Brand sub-name — may be treated as a title.

hero.headline.description: Main headline of the hero section on the home page.
hero.headline.notes: Sets the thesis of the site. Keep it punchy.

hero.body.description: Supporting paragraph under the hero headline.
hero.body.notes: Should evoke inner circles of power and grand decisions.

hero.cta.description: Call-to-action button text in the hero section.

hero.imageAlt.description: Alt text for the hero background image.
hero.imageAlt.notes: Describes a quill-on-parchment historical document image.

featured.heading.description: Section heading for the Featured Dossiers list on the home page.

featured.examineCta.description: Call-to-action link at the bottom of each dossier card.

philosophy.heading.description: Heading of the site philosophy section.

philosophy.body.description: Main paragraph describing the site's editorial philosophy.
philosophy.body.notes: Describes the brand's perspective on telling history. Brand is 'PowerPlays History' — 'PowerPlays' is one word (no space).

philosophy.integrity.heading.description: Sub-heading for the 'Primary Source Integrity' pillar.

philosophy.integrity.body.description: Body text for the 'Primary Source Integrity' pillar.

philosophy.immersion.body.description: Body text for the 'Narrative Immersion' pillar.

philosophy.uncertainty.body.description: Body text for the 'Uncertain Outcomes' pillar.
philosophy.uncertainty.body.notes: Emphasizes returning to the moment of decision, before the outcome was fixed.
